name: Chicken"saltimbocca
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to 1/4 inch thickness.
2. Season with salt and pepper, then place a sage leaf on each breast.
3. Lay one slice of prosciutto over each and fold in half like a book.
4. Secure with a toothpick and dredge the whole piece in seasoned flour.
5. Heat oil in a 12-inch to 14-inch saute pan until it begins to smoke.
6. Add chicken and cook until golden brown on both sides.
7. Add shallots and mushrooms, cooking until they have sweated for about 5-6 minutes.
8. Add marsala wine and chicken stock, then cook over high heat until reduced by half.
9. Swirl in butter and serve. Yield: 4 servings
